data.title: V2X (NYSE: VVX) earnings expected at $1.02 EPS on 2025-08-04. Past quarters resulted in price changes of -2.0% to 16.0%.Share price at $47.38 with 1.13% return in last 52 weeks. Analysts rate V2X as Buy with $55.0 price target, potential 16.08% upside.

Investors are eager for positive guidance along with surpassing estimates. Last quarter, V2X beat EPS by $0.05, resulting in a 2.06% drop in share price the next day. Over the last 52 weeks, V2X shares are up 1.13%, and analysts rate the stock as a Buy with an average one-year price target of $55.0, indicating a potential 16.08% upside. It's crucial for investors to understand the market sentiments and expectations in the industry before the earnings release.

data.title: Semler Scientific (NASDAQ: SMLR) to report $-0.27 EPS on 2025-08-04. Past performance saw -6.74 EPS Q1 2025 with -11.0% price change. Shares at $35.85, up 32.47% in 52-week period. data.description: Semler Scientific (SMLR) is set to release its quarterly earnings on August 4, 2025, with analysts expecting an EPS of $-0.27. data.title: Protara Therapeutics, Inc. granted stock options and RSUs to two new employees on Nasdaq (TARA) under Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Protara Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: TARA) disclosed that they provided inducement non-qualified stock options along with restricted stock units (RSUs) to two fresh recruits. Protara is a clinical-phase enterprise dedicated to crafting innovative treatments for cancer and rare ailments.

data.title: Ardelyx to report EPS of $-0.13, analysts expect positive guidance. Past misses led to stock drops. Shares down 25.3% in 52-week period.
data.description: Ardelyx (NASDAQ: ARDX) is set to announce its quarterly earnings, with analysts predicting an EPS of $-0.13. In the last earnings release, the company missed EPS by $0.09, causing a 24.5% drop in share price. As of July 31, Ardelyx's stock was trading at $4.24, down 25.3% over the last 52 weeks. Market sentiment is generally negative, with long-term shareholders likely bearish. Analysts rate Ardelyx as a Buy, with an average one-year price target of $10.00. data.title: Amgen declares $2.38 per share dividend for Q3 of 2025, to be paid on Sept 12.
data.description: Amgen, headquartered in Thousand Oaks, California, released news on August 1, 2025, declaring a dividend of $2.38 per share for the third quarter of 2025. This dividend is scheduled to be distributed on September 12, 2025, to shareholders of record at the end of business hours.

data.title: Thornburg Income Builder Opportunities Trust declares $0.10417/share distribution, payable on Aug 20, 2025 to shareholders of record by Aug 11.
data.description: A Trust named Thornburg Income Builder Opportunities Trust (NASDAQ: TBLD) based in Santa Fe, N.M., revealed the upcoming monthly distribution of $0.10417 per share for its common shareholders. The payment is scheduled for August 20, 2025, and will apply to shareholders of record as of August 11.

data.title: Shore Bancshares, Inc. declares quarterly dividend of $0.12 per share, payable on August 25, 2025 to stockholders on record.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Easton-based Shore Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: SHBI) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend for common stockholders. The dividend stands at $0.12 per share and is slated to be distributed on August 25, 2025. Shareholders recorded as of August 11, 2025 will be eligible to receive the dividend. Shore Bancshares continues to demonstrate financial stability and commitment to providing returns to its investors through this dividend declaration.

data.title: Trump demands firings after July's abysmal job report, showing only 73,000 jobs, down from previous months.
data.description: In July, the monthly jobs report revealed a mere 73,000 jobs, indicating significant decreases in the figures reported for May and June.

data.title: Texas Community Bancshares, Inc. reported a net income of $678,000 for Q2 2025 - net income for the first half is $1.3 million.
data.description: In Mineola, Texas, on August 1, 2025, Texas Community Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBS), the parent company of Broadstreet Bank, SSB, announced a net income of $678,000 for the quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The total net income for the company for that period amounted to $1.3 million.

data.title: Tether Gold (XAUt) market cap exceeds $800 million as institutions bolster BTC holdings amidst record high physical gold prices.
data.description: With gold prices peaking, the market capitalization of Tether Gold (XAUt) has exceeded $800 million. At the same time, Twenty One Capital, a Bitcoin treasury firm, is enlarging its holdings.
